title: Example reusable Daily Omega signal
why_it_matters: Explain why this signal matters for Tristan research, prototypes, IP, revenues, publications, or companies.
actionable_opportunity: State the smallest useful action that can be taken from this signal.

oak_check.risk: State the main risk, uncertainty, or weak point.
oak_check.falsification_route: State the smallest test that could reject or downgrade this signal.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: State the anti-error lesson to remember.

next_action: Create a dry-run issue spec and review it with OAK/IP criteria.
business_funding_signal: State the grant, customer, product, licensing, or revenue angle if relevant.
ip_signal: State public_open, private_research, prior_art_review, confidential_ip_review, publication_candidate, or revenue_experiment if known.
